rationale: The main alert (A0) indicates the creation of a scheduled task named '\npcapwatchdog' which executes 'C:\Program Files\Npcap\CheckStatus.bat'. This is a known legitimate component of Npcap, a network packet capture library. The other evidence items (EV-001, EV-002, EV-003) also show scheduled tasks created by legitimate software (Mozilla Firefox and Aurora Agent), further supporting a benign interpretation.
